key.name: window-width
key.description: Default width of the application window

key.name: window-height
key.description: Default height of the application window

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the window should be maximized on startup

key.name: library-path
key.description: Path to the folder containing the user's e-book collection

key.name: font-size
key.description: Font size used for reading text

key.name: theme
key.description: Color theme preference: system, light, or dark

key.name: tts-voice
key.description: Piper voice to use for text-to-speech

key.name: auto-page-turn
key.description: Whether to automatically advance to the next page after TTS finishes

key.name: last-book
key.description: Path to the last book that was opened

key.name: reading-positions
key.description: JSON object storing reading positions for each book
